title: No Explosion Particles
description: This Pack removes explosion particles and makes you better at crystal PVP
body:
# No Explosion Particles
![No Explosion Particles](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/23f56608882f57341d4c6ce9fb9b9a710ca60d48.png)![No Crystal Particles](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b8f7afed3d005f288a8c22cd5f00137f11294225.png)
### Features
- Removes the explosion particles 
- Makes you better at crystal PvP
- Gives you a b etter vision while explosion
- Reduces lag and gives more FPS
